meta.title: BlogAI Pro — The AI blogging platform for serious creators
meta.description: Write, optimize and publish SEO-ready articles to Blogger and WordPress in minutes. State-of-the-art AI, performance dashboard, monetization built-in.
meta.ogTitle: BlogAI Pro — AI blogging at a professional scale

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Still have doubts? Get in touch.

q1.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
q1.a: No. You get 10 credits on signup and can test every core feature for free.

q2.a: Yes. Articles are produced with state-of-the-art AI and pass originality checks before delivery.

q3.q: Does it work with WordPress or Blogger only?
q3.a: Both. We ship native Blogger integration and an official WordPress plugin.

q4.a: Absolutely. No lock-in — cancel in one click and keep access until the end of the paid cycle.

q5.a: Yes. Pix (BRL) via SyncPay and international cards (USD) via Stripe.

q6.a: Email support for all plans and priority for Pro and Premium customers.
